title: Darken watermark by 50 percent

requirements.text: Update the watermark styling in frontend/src/index.css to reduce the opacity by an additional 50 percent from the current level (making it significantly darker and more visible)
acceptanceCriteria: The watermark opacity in frontend/src/index.css is reduced by 50 percent from its current value
The watermark is visibly darker across all pages (Home, About Us, Products, ProductDetail, Farmer Network, Exports, Contact Us, and Admin)
The watermark remains properly positioned and does not obstruct page content

constraints: Do not change the watermark image source or positioning
Preserve the existing watermark background implementation in frontend/src/index.css
nonGoals: Adding new watermarks or visual elements
